repository.description: A frontend project health dashboard for analyzing repository quality, tooling, tests and documentation.

documentation.label: Documentation
documentation.description: README and setup documentation are mostly complete.

testing.label: Testing
testing.description: Unit and e2e testing foundation exists, but coverage can be improved.

ci.label: CI/CD
ci.description: Automated checks are configured for build and quality gates.

dependencies.label: Dependencies
dependencies.description: Core dependencies are modern, but update policy is not defined yet.

maintainability.label: Maintainability
maintainability.description: Project structure is predictable and follows layered architecture.

performance.label: Performance
performance.description: Build setup is optimized, but runtime metrics are not tracked yet.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Basic accessibility linting exists, but manual checks are still needed.

storybookMissing.label: Storybook is not configured
storybookMissing.description: Storybook can help document and test UI components in isolation.

envExampleMissing.label: .env.example is missing
envExampleMissing.description: Document required environment variables for local setup.

addGithubActions.title: Add GitHub Actions pipeline
addGithubActions.description: Run lint, build, unit tests and e2e tests on every pull request to prevent regressions.

addStorybook.title: Document UI components with Storybook
addStorybook.description: Add stories for shared UI components and important dashboard states.

addEnvExample.title: Add .env.example
addEnvExample.description: Document required environment variables so contributors can run the project locally.
